Tests the main process routine of handler related to parlor cleaning.

Tests the main process routine of handler.

Tests the basic receiving of manure.

tests.test_biophysical.test_manure.test_handler.test_handler.test_determine_handler_cleaning_water_volume(num_animals: int, cleaning_water_use_rate: float, cleaning_water_recycle_fraction: float, expected: float, handler: Handler) → None

Tests the calculation of cleaning water volume.

Tests the calculation of cleaning water volume.
